description: alice can directly assume an AdministratorAccess-backed role. IAMScope should emit validated admin_reachability for alice -> admin with no blockers on that validated target path.

ground_truth.reasoning: Alice has an identity policy allowing sts:AssumeRole on env06-admin, and env06-admin's trust policy explicitly allows Alice. The target role carries AdministratorAccess, so the path is structurally and runtime reachable.
aws_documentation_references: STS AssumeRole requires both a matching trust policy on the target role and an identity-based allow on the source principal.
AdministratorAccess marks the target role as admin-equivalent for IAMScope reachability reasoning.
